title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Fyers

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Fyers
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!
